---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

What problem does this solve? What are you trying to build?

## Proposed solution

How you'd like it to work. API shape, SDK method, config option, etc.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought of, and why they don't fully work.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, related issues.
